title: T1 filing compliance - Canada.ca
content:
## T1 Filing Compliance
T1 filing compliance is a Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) publication, which presents data about returns that were filed late or on time. The returns are grouped by demographic, geographic, and economic characteristics. Initial assessment values were used to produce the tables. Any changes resulting from reassessments are not included. Please note that from 2025 onwards, to reflect the most in-demand data by the public, this publication includes a reduced number of data tables that best meet user needs.
- 2025 Edition (2023 tax year)
- 2024 Edition (2022 tax year)
- 2023 Edition (2021 tax year)
- 2022 Edition (2020 tax year) - Revised
- 2021 Edition (2019 tax year) - Revised
- 2020 Edition (2018 tax year)
- 2019 Edition (2017 tax year)
- 2018 Edition (2016 tax year)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
